news.t: Exchange Traded Concepts Announces Launch of BCIL ETF with Bancreek Capital Advisors

holdings.infoBox: BCIL is an equity ETF with a total of 44 individual holdings. The top holdings are Unipol Assicurazioni stock at 4.55%, Benefit Systems at 4.30%, SK Square at 4.25%, Rolls-Royce Holdings at 4.04%, and HOCHTIEF Aktiengesellschaft at 3.96%.

overview.description: The Bancreek International Large Cap ETF (BCIL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed investing in large-cap non-US companies in developed markets. The fund aims for long-term growth of capital BCIL was launched on Mar 21, 2024 and is issued by Bancreek.

data.title: Exchange Traded Concepts Announces Launch of BCIL ETF with Bancreek Capital Advisors
